mapper.insert: INSERT INTO relationship_insight_cache (user_id, tag, entry_count, completed_count, insight_text, computed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tag}, #{entryCount}, #{completedCount}, #{insightText}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (user_id, tag) DO UPDATE SET entry_count = EXCLUDED.entry_count, completed_count = EXCLUDED.completed_count, insight_text = EXCLUDED.insight_text, computed_at = EXCLUDED.computed_at

INSERT INTO pattern_insight_cache (user_id, entry_count, completed_count, patterns_json, computed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{entryCount}, #{completedCount}, #{patternsJson}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET entry_count = EXCLUDED.entry_count, completed_count = EXCLUDED.completed_count, patterns_json = EXCLUDED.patterns_json, computed_at = EXCLUDED.computed_at
